message: Operation success.
description: 操作成功

message: Permission denied.
description: 调用方缺少所需权限。需要在 module.json5 中声明对应权限。常见权限: ohos.permission.MICROPHONE（录制）, ohos.permission.CAPTURE_SCREEN（录屏）

message: Not System App / System API error
description: 系统API仅限系统应用调用，非系统应用无权使用

message: Invalid parameter.
description: 参数错误。可能原因：必填参数未指定、参数类型不正确、参数校验失败

message: The api is not supported in the current version.
description: 当前版本不支持此 API 能力

message: The system memory is insufficient or the number of services reaches the upper limit.
description: 系统内存不足或服务数量达到上限。可能原因：同时创建了过多播放器/录制器实例

message: Current status does not allow or do not have permission to perform this operation.
description: 当前状态不允许此操作。典型场景：在错误的状态下调用了方法（如在 idle 状态调用 play）

message: Data flow exception information.
description: 数据流异常。可能原因：文件读取失败、网络数据流中断、编解码数据异常

message: System or network response timeout.
description: 系统或网络响应超时。常见于网络流媒体播放场景

message: Service process died.
description: 媒体服务进程死亡。可能原因：服务端异常崩溃、内存不足被系统杀死

message: Unsupported media format.
description: 不支持的媒体格式。文件格式、编码格式不被当前系统支持

message: Audio interrupted.
description: 音频被中断。典型场景：电话来电、其他高优先级音频抢占

message: The parameter value is out of the specified range.
description: 参数值超出指定范围。例如 seek 位置超出媒体时长

message: The parameter value means session does not exist.
description: 会话不存在

message: Seek continuous unsupported.
description: 当前源不支持连续 seek（拖拽进度条场景）

message: Super-resolution unsupported.
description: 超分辨率功能不支持

message: No PlaybackStrategy set to enable super-resolution feature.
description: 未通过 PlaybackStrategy 启用超分辨率功能

message: The address of server is incorrect, and IO can not find host.
description: 服务器地址错误，DNS 解析失败

message: Network connection timeout.
description: 网络连接超时

message: Failed link due to abnormal network.
description: 网络异常导致连接失败

message: Failed link due to unavailable network.
description: 网络不可用导致连接失败

message: Network permission denied.
description: 网络权限被拒绝

message: The client request parameters are incorrect or exceed the processing capacity.
description: 客户端请求参数错误或超出服务端处理能力

message: Cannot find available network resources.
description: 找不到可用的网络资源（404 等）

message: The server fails to verify the client certificate (not carried, invalid, or expired).
description: 服务端要求客户端 SSL 证书，但未携带、无效或已过期

message: The client fails to verify the server certificate (not carried, invalid, or expired).
description: 客户端验证服务端 SSL 证书失败

message: IO SSL server cert untrusted.
description: 服务端 SSL 证书不受信任

message: Unsupported request due to network protocols.
description: 网络协议不支持该请求

message: Http cleartext traffic is not permitted.
description: 不允许 HTTP 明文流量，需要使用 HTTPS
